message:
feat(extensions-js): wire repair_mode into readFileSync closure and add ext-conformance feature gate

Two changes to the PiJS extension runtime:

1. Repair mode wiring: clone repair_mode and Arc::clone repair_events
   into the readFileSync closure scope as configured_repair_mode, then
   use configured_repair_mode.should_apply() instead of the outer
   repair_mode reference. This fixes a lifetime issue where the closure
   captured a reference to the temporary instead of owning the value.

2. Feature-gated compat scan: is_compat_scan_mode() now also returns
   true when cfg!(feature = "ext-conformance") is enabled, allowing
   conformance test builds to automatically activate compat-scan
   behavior without requiring the PI_EXT_COMPAT_SCAN env var.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
